---
title: "Sophie Melissa Wegner"
role: intern
#projects: [hypomania]
image: "../images/sophie.png"
# programme: [gambling]
# listing:
#    - id: badges
#      contents: "../badges_awarded/sophie/*.jpg"
#      template: ../badges.ejs
#    - id : projects
#      contents: "../projects/*qmd"
#      type: default
#      include: 
#        people: [sophie]
#      fields: [description, title,funder]
about: 
  template: trestles
  image-width: 10em
  image-shape: round
---

My current research interests range from biopsychological health and qualitative studies – to cognition, neuropsychology, traumatic brain injury, language and decision making. I have a keen interest in metacognition and would like to develop my research skills further, especially my quantitative capabilities. In this internship I would like to gain experience of networking, group project work, and research with lab engagement and lab data collection. 

<!-- ## Projects I have been involved in -->

<!-- ::: {#projects} -->
<!-- ::: -->

<!-- ## Research Training  -->

<!-- ::: {#badges} -->

<!-- ::: -->
